message:
simplify: deduplicate plugin code and reduce hook input boilerplate

- Remove duplicate nameSet() method (identical to RegisteredNames())
- Extract parseMCPServerMap() to deduplicate MCP server JSON parsing
  in loadPluginMCPFile and discoverPluginMCPConfigs
- Add Session.hookInput() helper to centralize HookInput construction
  (SessionID + CWD + HookEventName), replacing 7 repeated struct literals
- Flatten nested type assertions in parseHookOutput (map lookup on nil
  returns zero value, making the outer existence check redundant)
- Inline single-use trimJSONWhitespace wrapper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
